title: BITSAT 2026 Admit Card Out Today at admissions.bits-pilani.ac.in

detail.title: BITSAT 2026 Admit Card Out Today at admissions.bits-pilani.ac.in
detail.short_info: BITSAT 2026 admit card will be released on 10 April 2026 for Session 1 on the official website, admissions.bits-pilani.ac.in. Know the BITSAT hall ticket release time, direct download link, step-by-step process, login details required, exam day guidelines, and what to do if you face issues while downloading

sections.heading: BITSAT 2026 Admit Card Out Today at admissions.bits-pilani.ac.in

content.text: BITS Pilani is set to activate the BITSAT 2026 admit card download link on April 10, 2026, for candidates who have successfully registered and completed the required procedures such as slot booking. The hall ticket will be available online only, and no physical copy will be sent by post, so candidates must log in and download it before the exam date.

items: Release Date: April 10, 2026.
Slot Booking: March 29 - March 31, 2026.
Session 1 Dates: April 15 - April 16, 2026.
Session 2 Dates: May 24 - May 26, 2026.

sections.heading: Official BITSAT 2026 Admit Card Website Link

content.text: The admit card will be hosted on the official BITS Pilani admission website for BITSAT 2026:

items: Official BITSAT admission portal: admissions.bits-pilani.ac.in
BITSAT 2026 section: Accessible from the admission homepage through dedicated BITSAT links.

content.text: Candidates should rely only on this official URL to download the BITSAT 2026 admit card and avoid third-party or unofficial links.

The BITSAT admit card is a mandatory document that confirms a candidate’s test slot, exam date, and exam centre details. It also serves as an identity document inside the exam hall when presented along with a valid photo ID.

rows: BITSAT 2026 - Birla Institute of Technology and Science Admission Test
Entrance test for integrated first-degree programmes at BITS Pilani and its campuses
BITSAT 2026 application number and password/date of birth
Document To Carry With Admit Card
Valid photo ID proof as specified in exam instructions

sections.heading: How To Download BITSAT Admit Card 2026 Online

content.text: Downloading the BITSAT 2026 admit card is an online process that candidates should complete well before the exam day to avoid last-minute issues.
Step-by-Step Process To Download BITSAT Hall Ticket 2026

items: Go to the official BITSAT admission website: admissions.bits-pilani.ac.in.
On the homepage, find and click on the “BITSAT 2026 Admit Card / Hall Ticket” link.
You will be redirected to the BITSAT 2026 candidate login page.
Enter your BITSAT 2026 application number and password or date of birth in the respective fields.
Fill in the captcha or security code if asked, then click on “Login” or “Submit”.
Your BITSAT 2026 admit card will appear on the screen with your photo, basic details, and exam schedule.
Check all details carefully, then click on the download/print option and save the PDF.
Take 2-3 clear printouts of the admit card on A4 paper and keep them safe for exam day.

content.text: Login Credentials Required For BITSAT 2026 Admit Card
To log in and download the hall ticket, candidates must have:

items: BITSAT 2026 application number.
Password or date of birth (as set at the time of registration).
Access to the registered email or mobile, in case password recovery is needed.

content.text: If you forget your password, use the “Forgot Password” link on the login screen, and follow the instructions to reset it using your registered email ID or mobile number.
Common Download Issues And Quick Fixes

items: Website not loading / server busy: Try again after some time, preferably during non-peak hours, and ensure you are using a stable internet connection.
Invalid credentials: Double-check the application number and password; ensure there are no extra spaces and the correct case is used.
Admit card not visible / blank page: Clear your browser cache, use a different browser, or try using another device.
Details mismatch or missing photo: Take a screenshot or printout and contact the BITS admission support immediately for guidance.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned On BITSAT 2026 Admit Card

content.text: Candidates must verify every detail printed on the BITSAT hall ticket to avoid issues on exam day.
Typical details on the BITSAT 2026 admit card include:

items: Candidate’s full name.
Photograph and signature.
BITSAT 2026 application number and possibly roll number.
Date of birth and category (if applicable).
Exam date, test slot and reporting time.
Exam centre name, city and full address.
Important exam instructions and guidelines.

content.text: If any detail appears incorrect or blurred, candidates should promptly raise the issue with the official helpline.

sections.heading: BITSAT 2026 Eligibility And Who Will Get The Admit Card

content.text: While detailed eligibility is covered in the official information brochure, the admit card is issued only to candidates who meet the minimum criteria and complete the registration process correctly.
Basic BITSAT 2026 Eligibility Criteria (Short Recap)
In general, BITSAT eligibility includes:

items: Completion or appearance in Class 12 or equivalent with the required subjects (usually Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics for engineering programmes).
A minimum aggregate percentage in qualifying exams as specified by BITS Pilani.
Meeting age and year-of-passing conditions mentioned in the BITSAT brochure.

content.text: Candidates who did not meet these conditions, or whose applications were incomplete or rejected, may not receive an admit card.
Conditions When BITSAT Admit Card May Not Be Issued
The BITSAT 2026 admit card typically will not be generated if:

items: The candidate’s application form was incomplete or rejected.
Payment of the application fee was not successfully confirmed.
Slot booking for the test date and centre was not completed within the allowed time.

content.text: Such candidates should immediately contact the admission office with proof of payment and application details.

sections.heading: BITSAT 2026 Official Links (Admit Card, Brochure, Helpdesk)

content.text: Candidates should bookmark the key official resources related to BITSAT 2026:

items: BITSAT 2026 admission website: Click Here
BITSAT 2026 admit card login page: (Available Soon)
